[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [HTMLView](../fast-element.htmlview/index.html) &gt; [isHydrated](../fast-element.htmlview.ishydrated/index.html)

## HTMLView.isHydrated property

Resolves `true` after prerendered content has been hydrated, `false` when client-side rendered or hydration not enabled.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isHydrated: Promise<boolean>;
```
